# Table Rendering Fixture

This document exists solely to exercise the viewer pipe-table renderer.

---

### REQ-p00001: Table Rendering Example

**Level**: PRD | **Status**: Active

The system SHALL render markdown pipe tables in the viewer as HTML tables with a full grid.

## Rationale

The following table demonstrates the rendered output that the viewer should produce.

| Column A | Column B | Column C |
| -------- | -------- | -------- |
| a1       | b1       | c1       |
| a2       | b2       | c2       |

The table above should appear with thin borders on every cell.

*End* *Table Rendering Example*
---
